zh.lifeSummary: 當Julian de Grey於大約1314年出生在威爾士丹比爾盧時，她的父親Roger de Grey29歲，母親Elizabeth de Hastings21歲。她與John Talbot結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1361年12月1日在她的家鄉享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julian de Grey于大约1314年出生在威尔士丹比爾盧时，她的父亲Roger de Grey29岁，母亲Elizabeth de Hastings21岁。她与John Talbot结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1361年12月1日在她的家乡享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Julian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the common Late Latin name Julianus, a derivative of Julius . In classical times Julianus was a name borne not only by various minor early saints, but also by the Roman emperor Julian ‘the Apostate’, who attempted to return the Roman Empire from institutionalized Christianity to paganism. For many centuries the English name Julian was borne by women as well as men, for example by the Blessed Julian of Norwich ( c.1342– after 1413 ). The differentiation in form between Julian and Gillian did not develop until the 16th century. Julian is still occasionally used as a girl's name. Notable bearers include the British classical guitarist Julian Bream ( b. 1933 ) and the British jazz pianist and bandleader Julian Joseph ( b. 1966 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Julian de Grey was born about 1314, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, her father, Roger de Grey, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth de Hastings, was 21. She married John Talbot. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 December 1361, in her hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julian de Grey est née environ 1314, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Roger de Grey, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Hastings, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Talbot. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 décembre 1361, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Julian de Grey um 1314 in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Grey 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Hastings 21. Sie hat John Talbot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Dezember 1361 im Alter von 48 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Julian de Grey è nata il circa 1314 nel Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, sua padre, Roger de Grey, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Hastings, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John Talbot. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 dicembre 1361, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Julian de Greyが約1314年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインで生まれた時，父Roger de Greyは29歳，母Elizabeth de Hastingsは21歳であった。John Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1361年12月1日に故郷で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Julian de Grey(이)가 대략 1314년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Grey(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Hastings(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 John Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 12월 1일 그녀의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Julian de Grey nasceu aproximadamente 1314, em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, seu pai, Roger de Grey, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Hastings, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John Talbot. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de dezembro de 1361, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julian de Grey родилась около 1314 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Roger de Grey было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Hastings, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Talbot. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 декабря 1361 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Julian de Grey nació aproximadamente 1314, en Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, su papá, Roger de Grey, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Hastings, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John Talbot. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de diciembre de 1361, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años.
